brief_question_sets.label: Planning / decision meeting
questions: What is the meeting trying to decide?
Who can make the final call?
Should Kyberion stop before speaking or can it facilitate?
brief_question_sets.notes: Use when the meeting is about a concrete decision or a plan.

brief_question_sets.label: Status / tracking meeting
questions: What should be tracked after the meeting?
Which action items belong to Kyberion to complete?
Which items need owner and deadline assignment?
Should the output prioritize a written summary or live facilitation?
brief_question_sets.notes: Use when the meeting is about updates, reviews, or follow-up tracking.

brief_question_sets.label: Incident / workshop
questions: What is the incident or workshop goal?
What authority does Kyberion have during the meeting?
What is the escalation path if consensus is not reached?
Should Kyberion capture transcript, summary, and action items?
brief_question_sets.notes: Use when the meeting needs live coordination and fast tracking.

role_sets.label: Planner / facilitator
role_sets.notes: Best when Kyberion should guide the agenda and keep decisions moving.

role_sets.label: Scribe / tracker
role_sets.notes: Best when Kyberion should primarily capture actions and follow-ups.

role_sets.label: Incident lead
role_sets.notes: Best when Kyberion must keep the group focused and produce immediate follow-ups.
